# Role Engagement Checklist

Use this checklist at the start of each project or major initiative to confirm which roles need to be engaged, who fills each role, and at which lifecycle stages they are most active. Update it as the project evolves.

_See [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) for full role descriptions._

---

## Project / Initiative Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Project Name** | [Project name] |
| **Project Manager** | [Name] |
| **Date Last Updated** | [YYYY-MM-DD] |

---

## Role Engagement Matrix

For each role, note the assigned person (or "TBD"), mark which lifecycle stages they are active in, and note any engagement notes or caveats.

**Lifecycle Stage Key:** I = Initiation · P = Planning · E = Execution · R = Release · Re = Retrospective

| Role | Assigned To | I | P | E | R | Re | Notes |
|---|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|---|
| **Project Manager (PM)** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Core role — always engaged |
| **Product Manager (PdM)** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Core role — always engaged |
| **Tech Lead / Engineering Lead** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Core role — always engaged |
| **Developers** | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | |
| **QA / Test Engineer** | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | |
| **UX Designer / Researcher** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | ✓ | Engage early for research-heavy features |
| **Security Lead** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | Required for security-sensitive changes |
| **Release Manager** | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | |
| **Site Reliability / Operations** | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | |
| **Customer Support / Success** | | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | |
| **Stakeholder / Sponsor** | | ✓ | ✓ | | ✓ | ✓ | Engage at key decision gates |
| **Change Manager** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Required when change affects end users or processes |
| **Data Analyst** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Engage when metrics / KPIs are a success criterion |
| **Legal / Compliance Advisor** | | ✓ | ✓ | | ✓ | | Required for regulated features, data handling, or new vendors |
| **Community Manager** | | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Required when changes affect external users or public-facing features |
| **AI / ML Lead** | | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | Required when the initiative includes AI/ML components |

---

## Extended Role Engagement Notes

For any role marked as engaged, add a brief note below about what specific tasks or decisions require their involvement on this project.

### Change Manager
- [ ] Change impact assessment completed: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Stakeholder communication plan in place: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Training / enablement plan in place: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Adoption metrics defined: [link or N/A]

### Data Analyst
- [ ] KPIs and success metrics defined: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Instrumentation requirements agreed with Engineering: [Yes / No / N/A]
- [ ] Dashboard / reporting artefact created: [link or N/A]

### Legal / Compliance Advisor
- [ ] Applicable regulatory frameworks identified: [list or N/A]
- [ ] Legal / compliance review scheduled or completed: [Yes / No / N/A]
- [ ] Compliance risks logged in the RAID log: [link or N/A]

### Community Manager
- [ ] Public-facing communication plan in place: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Community announcement drafted and reviewed: [Yes / No / N/A]
- [ ] Beta / early-access programme (if applicable): [link or N/A]

### AI / ML Lead
- [ ] AI/ML Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) created: [link or N/A]
- [ ] Responsible AI review completed: [Yes / No / N/A]
- [ ] Model evaluation / acceptance criteria defined: [link or N/A]
- [ ] AI-specific risks logged in the RAID log: [link or N/A]

---

| Product Manager | | |
| Change Manager (if applicable) | | |

| AI / ML Lead (if applicable) | | |
